vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit reveals a complete collapse of the indoor garden. Over the 5-day observation period, the specimens have been systematically removed or have perished. The current state is characterized by empty, dry pots and the presence of inorganic debris, suggesting the space has been repurposed or abandoned as a botanical site.
